title: Verify monthly plan identity contract
preconditions: A clean BUDGET state and valid, missing, repeated, invalid, non-calendar, and non-ZAR period inputs are available.
steps: Invoke the relevant Public Budget Operations and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-PLAN-IDENTITY, including its validation, lifecycle, compatibility, authority, replay, and unavailable paths where applicable.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-PLAN-IDENTITY holds; all documented errors are stable; every rejected or failed mutation leaves the required prior state unchanged; no prohibited side effect occurs.
